name: hpc-agentic-sdk
description: Claude Code skills for scientific computing tools

plugins.name: RAPTOR
plugins.description: Profile and alter floating-point precision in C, C++, and Fortran using RAPTOR

plugins.name: Tadashi
plugins.description: Check whether loop transformations (interchange, tiling, fusion) are mathematically safe using polyhedral analysis

plugins.name: make-vibe
plugins.description: Expose Makefile targets as MCP tools for building and running code on local or remote HPC systems via SLURM

plugins.name: rccs-cloud
plugins.description: Slurm job management, filesystem operations, and documentation search for the RIKEN R-CCS Cloud (heterogeneous: A64FX, x86_64, NVIDIA/AMD/Intel GPUs)

plugins.name: OpenACC
plugins.description: Automatically insert OpenACC directives into Fortran code using a verified template library for reliable GPU parallelization

plugins.name: bootstrap
plugins.description: Set up a new HPC project by determining goals, installing required skills, and creating a CLAUDE.md with mandatory workflows

plugins.name: hokusai
plugins.description: Slurm job management, filesystem operations, and documentation search for the RIKEN HOKUSAI BigWaterfall2 (HBW2) supercomputer

plugins.name: rikyu
plugins.description: Slurm job management, filesystem operations, and documentation search for the RIKEN AI4S supercomputer (NVIDIA GB200, aarch64)
